rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Process Execution in PerfLogs Directory

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Process Execution in PerfLogs Directory
id: 82469ee5-ccf3-4669-9be6-31830f7ef3d7
status: experimental
description: Detects process execution in PerfLogs folder - a folder used by Windows
  for log collection - and matching previously-observed naming patterns for ransomware
  executables.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/04
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1564
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    ParentImage|contains: perflogs
  selection2:
    ParentImage|re: ^.*\\[a-z]{3}\.exe
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
